series_metadata.series_description: Monthly, quarterly, and annual reports prepared and provided by the Plan Manager, Investment Advisor, Investment Manager, Custodian and Prepaid Card Service Provider that include, but are not limited to: the number of open and active STABLE accounts; the number of STABLE accounts closed; the number of open and active STABLE Card accounts; the number of STABLE Card accounts closed; the contributions, withdrawals, and interest of investment accounts; evaluation of performance of the Plan''''''''s investment portfolios, and benchmarking; an analysis of the Plan''''''''s investment portfolios against similar program investment options; analysis and summary of recent events in the financial markets; analysis of the allocation of the Plan''''''''s investments across asset classes and/or managers and changes in allocation; and other similar information.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until conclusion of fiscal year, and for an additional 4 fiscal years., Electronic: Delete
